name: Resource Coordinator
description: ParallelAgent that identifies available emergency shelters, estimates occupancy based on threat level, and computes available capacity. Runs concurrently with Vulnerability Mapper. Shelter occupancy is clearly labeled as 'estimated' since Florida Shelter Status System is not publicly accessible.

skills.name: Estimate Shelter Occupancy
skills.description: Estimates shelter occupancy from threat-level occupancy rates (NONE: 2%, MONITORING: 5%, WATCH: 15%, WARNING: 40%, CRITICAL: 75%). Clearly labeled as 'estimated' — Florida Shelter Status System (FLSHELTER) is not publicly accessible.
examples: How many shelter beds are available in Tampa Bay?
What is the current shelter occupancy rate?
Which shelter has the most available capacity?

skills.name: Compute Available Capacity
skills.description: Computes available beds per shelter and total system capacity. Returns shelter status (open/standby) based on threat level.
examples: What is the total shelter capacity for Tampa Bay?
How many more people can the shelter system accommodate?

shelter_occupancy.reason: Florida Shelter Status System (FLSHELTER) is not publicly accessible via API
shelter_occupancy.method: Threat-level occupancy rates based on historical hurricane response patterns

sends.description: Shelter status, capacity, and availability data for action plan generation

receives.description: Threat level to compute shelter occupancy estimates
